nineDots.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, slug, or id
nineDots.refineSearch: Showing first 200 of {{count}} — refine the search.

404.title: The page you are looking for is not found.
404.detail: Make sure the address is correct and the page hasn't moved. If you think this is a mistake,

500.title: Whoops, something went wrong!
500.detail: Try refreshing the page, or go back and attempt the action again. If the problem persists,

401.message: You do not have the necessary permissions to access this page.
401.contactAdmin: If you think this is an error, please contact the system administrator.

mfa.title: Two-factor authentication required
mfa.expired: Your grace window has expired. You will be locked out on next sign-in until you enroll.
mfa.remaining: Your role requires MFA. {{remaining}} to enroll before sign-in is blocked.
mfa.required: Your role requires MFA. Set it up to avoid being locked out of sign-in.

pages.loginRegisteredFlash: Account created. You can now sign in.
pages.loginResetFlash: Password updated. Please sign in with your new password.
pages.registerSubtitle: Get started with Orkestra in a minute.

auth.loginDisabled: Login is temporarily disabled by an administrator. Please try again later.
auth.registrationDisabled: Self-service registration is disabled. Contact your administrator for an invite.

forgot.title: Forgot your password?
forgot.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgot.sent: If an account with that email exists, a password reset email has been sent. Please check your inbox.

reset.title: Reset your password
reset.intro: Pick a new password for your account.
reset.success: Password updated. Redirecting you to the sign-in page…
reset.tokenInvalid: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.
reset.missingToken: Missing reset token. Please use the link from your email.
reset.failed: Unable to reset password. The link may have expired.

verify.title: Email verification
verify.pendingPrompt: We've sent a verification email to {{email}}. Click the link in that email to activate your account.
verify.noToken: No verification token was provided. Check your email for a verification link.
verify.success: Your email has been verified. You can now sign in.
verify.failed: The verification link is invalid or has expired.

mfa.title: Two-factor verification
mfa.promptDefault: Enter the code from your authenticator.
mfa.promptForEmail: Enter the code from your authenticator for {{email}}.

errors.missingCode: Enter the code shown in your authenticator app.
errors.tooMany: Too many attempts. Sign in again from the login page.
errors.generic: Unable to verify the code. Please try again.
errors.passkeyCancelled: The passkey prompt was cancelled or timed out.
errors.passkeyFailed: Passkey verification failed. Try again or use your authenticator app.

passwordConfirm.title: Confirm your password
passwordConfirm.intro: For your security, re-enter your password to continue this action.

errors.unavailable: Password reconfirm is unavailable for this account. Use your second factor or sign in again.
errors.tooMany: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.generic: Could not verify the password. Please try again.

stepUp.title: Confirm this action
stepUp.intro: For your security, re-verify with your second factor to continue.
stepUp.promptMfa: This action requires a fresh second-factor proof. Enter your authenticator code or use a passkey.
stepUp.promptPassword: This action requires your password. Re-enter it to continue.
stepUp.promptEnrollMfa: This action requires two-factor authentication. Enroll a factor to continue.

errors.missingCode: Enter the code from your authenticator.
errors.tooMany: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.generic: Could not verify the code. Please try again.
errors.passkeyCancelled: The passkey prompt was cancelled or timed out.
errors.passkeyFailed: Passkey verification failed. Try the authenticator app instead.

social.acceptingTerms: By signing in, you accept our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

callback.waitMessage: Please wait while we sign you in.

errors.missingFields: Please enter both email and password.
errors.fillRequiredFields: Please fill in all required fields.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least {{count}} characters.
errors.acceptTerms: You must accept the terms to continue.
errors.signupUnavailable: Sign-up is temporarily unavailable because email delivery is not configured. Please contact an administrator.
errors.createAccountFailed: Unable to create account. Please try again.
errors.emailNotVerified: Your email has not been verified.
errors.tooManyAttempts: Too many failed attempts. Please try again later.
errors.unableToSignIn: Unable to sign in. Please try again.
errors.registrationFailed: Could not create the account. Please try again.
errors.resetRequestFailed: Could not send the reset link. Please try again.
errors.resetFailed: Could not reset the password. The link may have expired.
errors.verifyFailed: Could not verify the email. The link may have expired.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

account.title: Account Settings
account.whoSeeProfileTooltip: Only the group of selected people can see your profile
account.whoCanTagTooltip: Only the group of selected people can tag you
account.showFollowers: Allow users to show your followers
account.showEmail: Allow users to show your email
account.showExperience: Allow users to show your experiences

billing.title: Billing Setting
billing.noPayment: You have not added any payment.

danger.title: Danger Zone
danger.privacyDescription: Download a copy of the personal data we hold for your account, or exercise your GDPR right to erasure.

security.title: Account security
security.description: Password, two-factor, sessions, and trusted devices live on their own page now.

adminTenants.rolesNeedOrg: Role management is scoped to a single organization. Select or create one from the top-right org switcher to continue.

adminRoles.intro: Manage roles and bindings for {{tenant}}. System roles are read-only; custom roles can be created by picking permissions from the catalog.

logLevels.title: Log levels
logLevels.description: Runtime log-level admin (ADR-0005 Phase F). Per-module overrides take effect immediately — no restart. Stdout + OTLP fanout (Phase E) honor the same threshold.
logLevels.confirmReset: Reset every log level to the env defaults captured at boot? This persists the change.
logLevels.resetDoneToast: Log levels reset to boot defaults
logLevels.globalFailToast: Failed to update global log level
logLevels.loadFailed: Failed to load log levels. The logging module may have failed init — check backend logs.

mfaReset.title: Reset MFA for {{user}}
mfaReset.warning: This will delete the user's registered authenticator and backup codes. They will be forced to enroll a new factor on their next sign-in, subject to the 7-day grace window.
mfaReset.prompt: Enter your own authenticator code to authorize this action.

errors.missingCode: Enter your authenticator code to authorize the reset.
errors.noFactor: This user has no MFA factor to reset.
errors.generic: Could not reset the factor. Please try again.

adminModules.noMatch: No modules match the current filters.

detail.saveFailed: Could not save configuration. Try again.
detail.noConfig: This module has no configurable fields.
